ops.title: cc-steer-lab retired 2026-07-14: read-only in-place archive
ops.body:
Full lab retirement executed per user directive ("I thought the entire point was to get rid of the lab?"):

- Both lab LaunchAgents removed: `com.cc-steer.e12-train` (E12 was complete — all phase markers incl. final.done, results/E12/cid.md written) and `com.cc-steer.replay` (E13 dual-shadow nightly collection STOPPED; ledger preserved at `results/E13/ledger.db`).
- `adapters/` (6.3G experiment LoRA weights) deleted — regenerable on Tinker from committed recipes+seeds; the production adapter lives in `~/.cc-steer/models`.
- Final snapshot commit `378f58b` captures the completed E12 results + retirement CLAUDE.md; tree is `chmod -R a-w` at `/Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-lab` (local git only, no remote — the tree IS the archive; user chose no tarball/GitHub).
- The deferred "repoint lab's editable cc-transcript after E12" item is moot — the lab venv is never synced again.
- Production replacement: cc-steer v0.12.0+ `cc_steer/retrain/` + weekly `com.cc-steer.retrain` agent. To touch the archive: `chmod u+w <path>` explicitly, per its CLAUDE.md.
